title: HANDOFF Block Schema
description: Declares the fields expected in an agent HANDOFF block, plus shared constants.

_constants.MISSING_HANDOFF_PLACEHOLDER: (no prior handoff; rely on plan + scope)

scope.description: What this agent was asked to do (one sentence).

risks.description: Risks or caveats the next agent should be aware of.

test-plan.description: How the agent verified its output (tests run, coverage, manual checks).

next-agent-input.description: Concrete context the next agent needs to continue (files changed, exported symbols, known issues).
